677 GG0170Q3_USE_WLCHR_END_CD GG0170Q3_USE_WLCHR_END_CD GG0170Q3 Mobility: Uses Wheelchair/Scooter at End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident uses a wheelchair or scooter at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
